phase: Additional tests for React integration with Arena system

arquivos_criados.descricao: 30 integration tests validating React Profiler with Arena Baseline system

integration_test_coverage.profiler_arena_integration: ✅ React Profiler works with Arena Baseline
integration_test_coverage.extensibility: ✅ System designed for adding new issue types

react_profiler_integration.validates: Issue generation, recommendations, severity, component names, impact estimation

arena_baseline_aggregation.validates: Integration with baseline, separate tracking, issue classification

profiler_resilience.validates: Missing components, syntax errors, missing imports, edge cases

recommendations_quality.validates: memo suggestions, callback suggestions, memoization suggestions, collection explanations, dependency explanations

metrics_consistency.validates: Summary totals, component counts, issue counts, statistics validity

output_consistency.validates: Timestamp generation, project path maintenance, recommendations availability, multiple analysis consistency

extensibility.validates: New issue type support, custom recommendations, required field presence

integration_patterns_validated.arena_baseline_extension: ✅ React profiler extends baseline without modifying existing code
integration_patterns_validated.issue_separation: ✅ React issues tracked separately from bundle/database/dead-code issues
integration_patterns_validated.recommendation_aggregation: ✅ React recommendations can be combined with other analyzers
integration_patterns_validated.performance_correlation: ✅ React performance issues can be correlated with bundle metrics
integration_patterns_validated.error_isolation: ✅ React analysis errors don't affect other analyzers
integration_patterns_validated.metrics_aggregation: ✅ React metrics integrate cleanly into summary statistics

analyzer_list.name: Lighthouse Analyzer
analyzer_list.focus: Dynamic performance metrics from headless Chrome
analyzer_list.metrics: performance, accessibility, best practices, SEO scores + Core Web Vitals

analyzer_list.name: Bundle Analyzer
analyzer_list.focus: Static bundle composition and size analysis
analyzer_list.metrics: total size, gzipped size, chunks, dead code, duplicates

analyzer_list.name: Database Analyzer
analyzer_list.focus: N+1 query detection and ORM optimization
analyzer_list.metrics: N+1 query count, batch opportunities, ORM hints

analyzer_list.name: React Component Profiler
analyzer_list.metrics: missing memo, missing callbacks, inline objects, dependency arrays

next_steps.sprint_3: Advanced correlation and machine learning-based optimization suggestions

notes: React Integration Tests complete. 30/30 tests passing. Validates full integration of React Component Profiler with Arena Baseline system, bundle correlator, and error handling. Sprint 2.2 now complete with 4 comprehensive analyzers (Lighthouse, Bundle, Database, React), CLI integration, multi-analyzer aggregation baseline, and bundle correlation engine. Ready for Sprint 2.3 real-time monitoring and advanced optimization features.
